products.name: mSwasth
products.shortDescription: Comprehensive health insurance that covers hospitalisation, surgeries, and medical expenses up to ₹1,00,000.
products.description:
mSwasth is a comprehensive health insurance plan designed to provide financial protection against medical expenses. It covers hospitalisation costs, surgical procedures, pre and post-hospitalisation expenses, and day-care treatments. With mSwasth, you get cashless treatment at network hospitals across India, ensuring peace of mind for you and your family.

Key Benefits:

• Cashless hospitalisation at 5000+ network hospitals
• Coverage for pre and post-hospitalisation expenses
• Day-care procedure coverage
• No medical check-up required for enrollment
• Easy claim settlement process
• 24/7 customer support

products.name: Mobile Damage Protection
products.shortDescription: Protect your smartphone against accidental damage, screen breakage, and theft with coverage up to ₹15,000.
products.description:
Mobile Damage Protection provides comprehensive coverage for your smartphone against unexpected damages and incidents.

Key Benefits:
• Accidental damage coverage
• Screen breakage protection
• Theft protection
• Coverage up to ₹15,000
• Easy claim process
• Pan-India service network

Perfect for smartphone users who want peace of mind against accidental damage and theft.

products.name: Cyber Protection
products.shortDescription: Secure your digital life against identity theft, online fraud, and cyber bullying with coverage up to ₹50,000.
products.description:
Cyber Protection insurance safeguards you against the growing threats of the digital world.

Key Benefits:
• Identity theft coverage
• Online fraud protection
• Cyber bullying coverage
• Coverage up to ₹50,000
• Legal expense coverage
• 24/7 cyber helpline

In today's digital age, this plan provides essential protection against cyber threats and online fraud.

products.name: Personal Accident Cover
products.shortDescription: Financial protection against accidental injuries, disability, and death with coverage up to ₹2,00,000.
products.description:
Personal Accident Cover provides financial protection to you and your family in case of accidental injuries.

Key Benefits:
• Accidental death benefit
• Permanent disability coverage
• Temporary disability coverage
• Coverage up to ₹2,00,000
• No medical check-up required
• Instant policy issuance

This plan ensures your family's financial security in case of unfortunate accidents.

products.name: Hospicash
products.shortDescription: Daily cash benefit during hospitalisation to cover incidental expenses up to ₹500/day.
products.description:
Hospicash provides daily cash benefits during hospitalisation to help cover incidental and out-of-pocket expenses.

Key Benefits:
• Daily cash benefit up to ₹500/day
• No bills or receipts required
• Covers incidental expenses
• Complements existing health insurance
• Easy claim process

Hospicash acts as a supplement to your existing health insurance by providing daily cash during hospital stays.

products.name: Fire & Burglary Insurance
products.shortDescription: Protect your home and belongings against fire, burglary, and natural disasters with coverage up to ₹5,00,000.
products.description:
Fire & Burglary Insurance provides comprehensive protection for your home and valuable belongings.

Key Benefits:
• Fire and allied perils coverage
• Burglary and theft protection
• Natural disaster coverage
• Coverage up to ₹5,00,000
• Personal belongings coverage
• Easy and fast claim settlement

Secure your home and possessions against unforeseen events with this comprehensive insurance plan.
